# Test AWS Knowledge Base server error handling

# Test invalid JSON-RPC request
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"invalid_method","params":{}}' | timeout 5s go run .
stderr 'method not found'

# Test malformed JSON
exec echo 'invalid json' | timeout 5s go run .
stderr 'invalid character'

# Test missing method
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"params":{}}' | timeout 5s go run .
stderr 'missing method'

# Test invalid tool arguments
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"query_knowledge_base","arguments":"invalid"}}' | timeout 5s go run .
stderr 'invalid arguments'

# Test nonexistent tool
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"nonexistent_tool","arguments":{}}}' | timeout 5s go run .
stderr 'tool not found'
